name: @salom/web
description: Dastur vaqtida: `npm run dev` (HMR). `npm start` / `next start` — faqat `build` dan keyin; kod o'zgartirsangiz qayta `build` kerak, bo'lmasa Internal Error yoki noto'g'ri .next bo'lishi mumkin.

scripts.prestart:
node -e "if (!process.env.CI && !process.env.SKIP_WEB_PRESTART) console.warn('
[Salom web] Dastur: npm run dev (HMR, qayta ishga tushirish shart emas).
            Production: npm start - kod o'zgartirsangiz avval npm run build, bo'lmasa Internal Error.
')"
scripts.start:prod: npm run clean && npm run build && next start -p 3001
